raw_text: Had coffee with Maria Chen, a senior data scientist at Stripe. She spent 4 years at Airbnb before Stripe, working on fraud analytics. We talked about moving from analytics into ML platform work, and how she broke into fintech. Follow up: send her my dashboard project.

contacts.name: Maria Chen
contacts.title: Senior Data Scientist
contacts.background: Spent 4 years at Airbnb on fraud analytics before Stripe

raw_text: Quick call with Dev Patel (founder & CEO of NimbusAI, a seed-stage AI infra startup). Ex-Google, worked on TPU compilers. NimbusAI builds an inference-optimization layer for LLM serving. He's hiring a forward-deployed engineer. Action: intro him to my classmate who does MLOps.
